goal: Compare several outer-lane action sequences with a cheap 20-60 turn rollout, then reserve budget for the best queue.
main_idea: Generate multiple lane candidates, estimate capture order / enemy contest / compounding production, choose the strongest rollout lane, and prioritize its first queue targets before normal greedy selection.
notes: Inspired by rolling-horizon / forward-planning ideas: do not globally prefer outer planets; choose one concrete action sequence and make the scorer serve that strategy.
